---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the user need or pain point.

**Proposed behavior**
What you'd like RedEye to do differently.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why they fall short.

**Does this fit the "opinionated, not flexible" stance?**
RedEye deliberately avoids configuration knobs. Why is this the right addition (as opposed to a user workaround or a fork)?

**Additional context**
